name: Transpower New Zealand Limited 3.823% SNR BDS 06/03/2025 NZD5000
summary: Transpower New Zealand Limited 3.823% SNR BDS 06/03/2025 NZD5000 is a bond issued by Transpower New Zealand Limited. It represents a debt obligation of Transpower with a fixed interest rate and maturity date. The bond is denominated in New Zealand dollars.
